scripts.sync-www: robocopy . www *.html *.css *.js *.Snippet *.json *.png /S /XD node_modules android .git .vscode .gemini www /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /nc /ns /np || exit 0
scripts.build: npm run sync-www && npm run fix-java
scripts.push: git add . && git commit -m "Update" && git push
scripts.save: git add . && git commit -m "Quick save" && git push
scripts.sync: git pull && git add . && git commit -m "Sync" && git push
scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npm run fix-java && dev.bat
